voices.vibe_blurb: A nonprofit network of trained civilian counselors offering free, confidential guidance on discharges, AWOL/UA, and service-member rights. Calm, non-judgmental, and squarely on the side of the person in uniform who needs honest information.
voices.representative_quote: Our trained civilian counselors are ready to help you sort out your options.

voices.vibe_blurb: A historical voice of veterans who came home and spoke up — still active, still publishing veteran writing decades later. The tone is steady, plainspoken, and rooted in lived experience.
voices.representative_quote: We believe that service to our country and communities did not end when we were discharged. We remain committed to the struggle for peace and for social and economic justice for all people.

voices.site_name: Iraq and Afghanistan Veterans of America
voices.vibe_blurb: A modern post-9/11 veterans organization that amplifies the voices of the newest generation of vets in media, policy, and the public square. Forward-leaning, member-driven, and focused on lived experience.
voices.representative_quote: IAVA increases awareness in the media, among the American public, and in Washington to ensure that the voices of our newest generation of veterans are heard and listened to.

voices.vibe_blurb: A nonpartisan watchdog that investigates corruption and abuse of power across the federal government, including the military and defense establishment. Careful, evidence-based, and built for the long haul.
voices.representative_quote: We investigate corruption and abuse of power in the federal government. And we promote commonsense reforms that strengthen our democracy and build a more equitable, accountable government.

voices.vibe_blurb: A Bay Area nonprofit that has spent decades walking alongside veterans through homelessness, unemployment, disability, and health struggles. The voice is warm, practical, and stays with people for the long road home.
voices.representative_quote: We understand that the issues veterans face - including homelessness, unemployment, disability, and health - are interconnected and require wraparound support.
